items.name: System Diagnostics & Scanning
items.desc: Real-time monitoring of data lines and flows, active fault code detection, and restoration of vehicle communication networks.
items.longDesc: Real-time monitoring of data lines and flows, active fault code detection, and restoration of vehicle communication networks — we find the root cause before touching a single part, and explain it before we quote.

items.name: Electrical Problem Solving
items.desc: Tracing and repair of short circuits, advanced alternator, connector, sensor, and automotive & industrial relay diagnostics.
items.longDesc: Tracing and repair of short circuits, plus advanced diagnostics of alternators, connectors, sensors, and automotive & industrial relays, with documented circuit verification before delivery.

items.name: High-Pressure Hydraulic Systems
items.desc: Diagnostics and repair of leaks in lines, hoses, pressure pumps, hydraulic cylinders, valves, and heavy equipment control systems.
items.longDesc: Diagnostics and repair of leaks in lines, hoses, pressure pumps, hydraulic cylinders, valves, and heavy equipment control systems — stable pressure, no leaks, load-tested before handover.

items.name: Fleet General Mechanics
items.desc: Corrective and preventive mechanical services for heavy-duty diesel trucks, gasoline and utility vehicles.
items.longDesc: Corrective and preventive mechanical services for heavy-duty diesel trucks, gasoline and utility vehicles, with a service record per vehicle and contract-based maintenance windows.

items.name: On-Site Mobile Support
items.desc: Deployment of fully equipped mobile units with advanced tools to solve technical issues in hard-to-access work areas or remote projects.
items.longDesc: Deployment of fully equipped mobile units with advanced tools to solve technical issues in hard-to-access work areas or remote projects: the shop comes to where your equipment operates.

items.name: Roadside Mechanical Assistance
items.desc: Rapid response on highways and transport routes to minimize commercial vehicle and heavy equipment downtime.
items.longDesc: Rapid response on highways and transport routes to minimize commercial vehicle and heavy equipment downtime. One goal: getting your operation moving again.

items.name: Salvage & Component Recovery
items.desc: Recovery, disassembly and evaluation of parts and reusable components to reduce costs and extend the useful life of equipment.
items.longDesc: Recovery, disassembly and evaluation of parts and reusable components to reduce costs and extend the useful life of equipment — value recovered from machines others would write off.
